truthAudit.Summary: Audit of Run 2 reveals 5 correctly identified vulnerabilities out of 20 ground-truth items. Two findings in Run 2 were false positives relative to the provided ground truth. The remaining 15 vulnerabilities were missed.

Items.Notes: The previous answer correctly identified the format string vulnerability in logging with matching evidence and CWE.
Integer overflow in factorial computation was not mentioned in the previous analysis.
The previous answer correctly identified the use-after-free in deferred history processing with matching evidence and CWE.
Command injection via config validation was not identified; the previous answer incorrectly attributed command injection to the admin console instead.
The previous answer correctly identified the inverted length check leading to stack buffer overflow with matching evidence and CWE.
Race condition in thread-pool counter was not mentioned in the previous analysis.
Logic bomb in authentication was not mentioned in the previous analysis.
Path traversal in configuration loading was not mentioned in the previous analysis.
The previous answer correctly identified the heap buffer overflow in the expression parser with matching evidence and CWE.
The previous answer correctly identified the hardcoded administrator credentials with matching evidence and CWE.
Weak PRNG for session tokens was not mentioned in the previous analysis.
Thread-unsafe timestamp cache in logging was not mentioned in the previous analysis.
Insecure temporary file handling was not mentioned in the previous analysis.
Persistent authentication state was not mentioned in the previous analysis.
Unhandled exception in variable parsing was not mentioned in the previous analysis.
Integer underflow in memory-pool block split was not mentioned in the previous analysis.
Unbounded recursion in parser was not mentioned in the previous analysis.
Data race in result cache was not mentioned in the previous analysis.
TOCTOU in config loading was not mentioned in the previous analysis.
Integer division by zero in command routing was not mentioned in the previous analysis.
